Victorian Legislation and Parliamentary Documents 
  
1   Version No. 001  
Education (Special Developmental Schools) 
Act 1976 
Act No. 8918/1976 
Version incorporating amendments as at 25 November 1997 
 
An Act to make Provision with  respect to Members of the 
Teaching Service at Special Developmental Schools. 
 
BE IT ENACTED by the Queen's Most Excellent Majesty by 
and with the advice and consen t of the Legislative Council 
and the Legislative Assembly of  Victoria in this present 
Parliament assembled and by th e authority of the same as 
follows (that is to say): 
 1. Short title and commencement 
 (1) This Act may be cited as the Education (Special 
Developmental Schools) Act 1976 . 
 (2) This Act shall come into operation on the day on 
which it receives the Royal Assent. 
 2. Definitions 
In this Act unless inconsis tent with the context or 
subject-matter— 
"special developmental school"  means any 
special school within the meaning of Division 2 of Part IV of the Education Act 
1958  which is a school for intellectually 
handicapped children registered as a day training centre under the Mental Health Act 
1959  for which the Education Department 
provides teachers or general educational facilities; 
 S. 2 def. of 
"special 
develop-
mental school" 
substituted by 
No. 9714 
s. 88(a)(i). 
Victorian Legislation and Parliamentary Documents 
 Act No. 8918/1976  
   
Education (Special Developmental Schools) Act 1976 
2    * * * * * 
  
 3. Determination of entitlements 
Notwithstanding anything in any Act in 
computing the period of service of a member of the teaching service provided by the Education Department at a special  developmental school 
who immediately prior to being so provided was a teacher at a place registered as a day training centre under the  Mental Health Act 1959 for the 
purpose of determining any entitlement to long service leave or sick leave there shall be taken into account to the extent approved by the Minister in any case any service as a teacher at any place registered as aforesaid and any service so approved shall be deemed to be continuous with 
any other service required to be taken into account for the purposes aforesaid. 
═══════════════  S. 2 def. of

3   ENDNOTES 
1. General Information 
The Education (Special Developmental Schools) Act 1976 was assented to 
on 7 December 1976 and came into operation on 7 December 1976: 
section 1(2). Endnotes
